title: Closer To Reality
description: Makes minecraft more realistic, by adding many Quality of life mods.
body:
# If we have it in real life, why not have it in Minecraft?

The modpack adds these things to minecraft: Thirst, body temperature, seasons, butchery, diet, zoom, winds and better rain, shaders, over 40+ animals, dynamic lights, better combat and player animations, more seeds and foods, custom world generation and Euphoria Patches.

# Euphoria Patches

I recommend adding Complementary Shaders to fully experience what Euphoria offers. Keep in mind that using shaders **will reduce performance**, so only use them if you have a **powerful** PC.

# Recommended Specs

Use at least **8 gigabytes of RAM**. If you use shaders, you may need even more. Make sure to have a **decent graphics** card as well.

Don't worry, because i used mods to optimize the game, as much as i can!
